title: Sentinel Shield release evidence record
description: Records the REAL consumer-project CI runs that back a Sentinel Shield release stage. Lives at evidence/releases/<version>.json. The machinery is fail-closed: an empty consumer_runs[] with all required_evidence flags false is the honest 'no proof yet' state and MUST NOT satisfy any stage gate. Contains NO secrets, tokens, or credentials.

version.description: Release version this evidence file documents, e.g. '2.0.0' or '2.0.0-beta.1'.

engine_commit.description: Full Sentinel Shield engine commit SHA the consumer runs exercised. Empty placeholders are not allowed once real evidence exists; use 'unknown' only for honest no-evidence drafts.

consumer_runs.description: One entry per real consumer-project workflow run. Empty array means no proof has been collected yet.

stack.description: The evidence dimension this run proves. Mirrors a required_evidence key.

repository.description: Consumer repository the run executed against, e.g. 'org/laravel-demo'.

commit.description: Consumer-project commit SHA the run exercised.

profile.description: Sentinel Shield profile used, e.g. 'laravel' or 'laravel-react-docker'.

workflow_run_id.description: Provider run identifier (e.g. GitHub Actions run id / URL). Non-empty proves a real run; never fabricate.

result.description: Final result of the run. Only 'success' counts toward a stage gate.

artifacts_verified.description: True when the run's published artifacts (reports/SBOM) were fetched and verified, not merely assumed.

required_evidence.description: Honest per-dimension proof flags. A flag is true ONLY when a successful, artifact-verified consumer run backs it. All-false is the legitimate no-evidence-yet state.
